member.name: T:FACTSSpecManager.My.Resources.Resources
member.summary: A strongly-typed resource class, for looking up localized strings, etc.

member.name: P:FACTSSpecManager.My.Resources.Resources.ResourceManager
member.summary: Returns the cached ResourceManager instance used by this class.

member.name: P:FACTSSpecManager.My.Resources.Resources.Culture
member.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.

member.name: M:FACTSSpecManager.Encryptor.EncryptStringToFile(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Encrypt input contents And write to file
member.param: Contents which Is needed to encrypt
